chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: This little box may surprise you.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Well, this is Realme Buds T500 Pro.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: And it can fit in double price earbuds for just 2700 rupees.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Its candy box shaped case is of compact and premium quality with the flashy lanyard.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: And it is also actually useful and handy to pull out from pockets and bag.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Also, if you look behind this box, it supports high-res audio and LHDC codec at this price.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Also, the connection is super fast with Bluetooth 6.1.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Usually, you get the option to connect two devices in earbuds.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: But you can connect three devices in this.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: It's amazing.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Also, the earbuds are light in weight and fit well in ears with the silicon tips.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Also, the ANC is excellent for the price.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: You also get smart mode inside the Realme Link app.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: That dynamically cancels out the noise.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Depending upon the noise around you.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Also, you get a lot of customization in the app for deeper bass, equalizer and buttons customization as well.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: And one of the best part is the sound quality.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Its 12.4mm titanium plated sound drivers are very responsive and well-tuned.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: For heavy bass, clear vocals and precise treble.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: And I really liked its tuning.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Now, if the price is low, you might think that they have compromised in the mic quality.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: But no, you get three mics in both the earphones.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Total 6 mics.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Which can cancel out the noise during calls.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: That means you can confidently attend calls and meetings no matter how much noise is around you.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: In full charge, you get up to 23 hours of playback time with the case.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: That too with ANC and LHDC codec on.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Which is usually found in premium earbuds.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: And with ANC off and double AC codec, the battery life almost doubles.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: So, these are surprising earbuds, right?

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: What do you think? Can you get a better deal for 2700 rupees?

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Tell us in the comments below.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: And for more videos like this, follow and subscribe to MySmartPrice.

text: This little box may surprise you. Well, this is Realme Buds T500 Pro. And it can fit in double price earbuds for just 2700 rupees. Its candy box shaped case is of compact and premium quality with the flashy lanyard. And it is also actually useful and handy to pull out from pockets and bag. Also, if you look behind this box, it supports high-res audio and LHDC codec at this price. Also, the connection is super fast with Bluetooth 6.1. Usually, you get the option to connect two devices in earbuds. But you can connect three devices in this. It's amazing. Also, the earbuds are light in weight and fit well in ears with the silicon tips. Also, the ANC is excellent for the price. You also get smart mode inside the Realme Link app. That dynamically cancels out the noise. Depending upon the noise around you. Also, you get a lot of customization in the app for deeper bass, equalizer and buttons customization as well. And one of the best part is the sound quality. Its 12.4mm titanium plated sound drivers are very responsive and well-tuned. For heavy bass, clear vocals and precise treble. And I really liked its tuning. Now, if the price is low, you might think that they have compromised in the mic quality. But no, you get three mics in both the earphones. Total 6 mics. Which can cancel out the noise during calls. That means you can confidently attend calls and meetings no matter how much noise is around you. In full charge, you get up to 23 hours of playback time with the case. That too with ANC and LHDC codec on. Which is usually found in premium earbuds. And with ANC off and double AC codec, the battery life almost doubles. So, these are surprising earbuds, right? What do you think? Can you get a better deal for 2700 rupees? Tell us in the comments below. And for more videos like this, follow and subscribe to MySmartPrice.
